page_title: Evangelion New Theatrical Edition EVANGELION MECHANICS
text:
is a line of candy toys produced by Shokugan that was released on 24 September 2013. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2013/829184.html The line was based on the Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo film.

There are 2 main figures in the line, the AAA Wunder that come with one of the following: Evangelion 13, Evangelion Mark.09 or Evangelion Production Model Custom Type-08β. And the Booster Units that come with one of the following: Evangelion Production Model-02'β or Evangelion Production Model Custom Type-08α.

Trivia

The full size of the AAA Wunder is 18cm from each point and 14.5cm from each wing.
The full size of the Booster Unit is 14cm from booster to shield, and 20.5cm in total length when the rifle is deployed.
